text.title: Procurement Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is make-or-buy decision still open with procurement policy available?

conclusion.verdict: Use the assigned vendor; document decision rationale separately

branch.when: decision_open == true AND make_or_buy_done == true AND sow_drafted == false
decision_open == true AND make_or_buy_done == true AND sow_drafted == true

example.trace: decision_open=true → make_or_buy_done=true → sow_drafted=true → weights locked → scored bid → vendor selected.
